mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
t.title t.completed
CASE t.priority WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 3 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END
t.deadline t.created_at
ASC DESC
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.title, t.completed, t.priority, t.deadline, t.created_at, s.id AS subject_id, s.field_name AS subject_field_name, s.major_name AS subject_major_name, s.minor_name AS subject_minor_name, s.color AS subject_color, s.understanding AS subject_understanding FROM todos t INNER JOIN subjects s ON s.id = t.subject_id ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.completed, t.priority, t.deadline, t.created_at, s.id AS subject_id, s.field_name AS subject_field_name, s.major_name AS subject_major_name, s.minor_name AS subject_minor_name, s.color AS subject_color, s.understanding AS subject_understanding FROM todos t INNER JOIN subjects s ON s.id = t.subject_id WHERE t.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos (title, completed, priority, subject_id, deadline) VALUES (#{title}, COALESCE(#{completed}, FALSE), #{priority}, #{subject.id}, #{deadline})
mapper.update: UPDATE todos SET title = #{title}, completed = #{completed}, priority = #{priority}, subject_id = #{subject.id}, deadline = #{deadline} WHERE id = #{id}
